exercises.name: Resistance Band Seated Hip Abduction
instructions: Anchor the resistance band and maintain initial tension.
Pre-engage the abductors before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.
